ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Blair Witch Project

Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Blair Witch
HBO2.HD.us2.description: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO2.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO2.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO2.HD.us2.description: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO2.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Weapons
HBO2.HD.us2.description: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Smashing Machine
HBO2.HD.us2.description: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO2.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO2.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites

HBO.West.us2.title: Joker
HBO.West.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.West.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.West.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.West.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.West.us2.title: Logan
HBO.West.us2.description: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO Batman Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: There are big changes brewing in Gotham, but if Batman (Will Arnett) wants to save the city from the Joker's (Zach Galifianakis) hostile takeover, he may have to drop the lone vigilante thing, try to work with others and maybe, just maybe, learn to lighten up. Maybe his superhero sidekick Robin (Michael Cera) and loyal butler Alfred (Ralph Fiennes) can show him a thing or two.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Abandoned by his parents and raised by an aunt and uncle, teenager Peter Parker, AKA Spider-Man, is trying to sort out who he is and exactly what his feelings are for his first crush, Gwen Stacy. When Peter finds a mysterious briefcase that was his father's, he pursues a quest to solve his parents' disappearance. His search takes him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors, setting him on a collision course with Connors' alter ego, the Lizard.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Greater conflict lies ahead for Spider-Man, with the emergence of Electro, a foe far more powerful than he is and the return of his old friend, Harry Osborn.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Date Night
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Match
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: MoviePass, MovieCrash
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Exploring the company's founding and the implosion that occurred after outside investors took over, rendering the company bankrupt and under investigation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Mom Jayne
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Mariska Hargitay's journey to understand and embrace the public and private legacy of her mother, Hollywood icon Jayne Mansfield.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Elizabeth Taylor: The Lost Tapes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Allowing Elizabeth Taylor ́s own voice to narrate her story, accompanied by personal photos, home movies, and clips from her iconic roles that mirror her real life challenges and triumphs while also challenging audiences to reconsider Taylor ́s legacy. Through newly discovered interviews with Taylor and unprecedented access to the movie star ́s personal archive, the film reveals the complex inner life and vulnerability of the Hollywood legend and of a life lived on a global stage.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flow
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Norm of the North
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Surviving Ohio State
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Based on the Jon Wertheim's 2020 Sports Illustrated article, Why Aren't More People Talking About the Ohio State Sex Abuse Scandal?, chronicling Dr. Richard Strauss' years-long abuse told in part by his victims - male wrestlers and football players - most of whom have never spoken about their trauma. The documentary will also examine the allegations that Congressman Jim Jordan, an OSU assistant coach from 1986-1994, knew about and ignored Dr. Strauss' crimes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Critical Incident: Death at the Border
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Examine the 2010 case involving the death of Anastasio Hernández-Rojas, an undocumented Mexican immigrant who died while in custody at the border; when eyewitness video emerges, it sparks a far-reaching investigation from a border checkpoint to D.C.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: All Eyez on Me
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Gasland Part II
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Josh Fox examines the potential long-term environmental impact of hydraulic fracturing, including poisonous water and earthquakes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts: A Natural History
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Delving into the mythological, including dragons, mermaids, and unicorns -- alongside examinations of natural world beasts, such as vervet monkeys, narwhals, and manatees; Stephen Fry travels far and wide to learn about such animals.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Night Is Not Eternal
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Night Is Not Eternal is a deeply personal exploration of political activism through the eyes of Chinese American filmmaker Nanfu Wang. For over seven years, Nanfu follows Rosa Maria Paya, a young Cuban activist and daughter of five-time Nobel Peace Prize nominee Oswaldo Paya, in her fight for democratic change in Cuba. Driven by her own experiences in China, Nanfu is drawn to Rosa's story and the parallels between their homelands. With intimate access, Nanfu follows Rosa's journey from the streets of Havana to rallies and conferences worldwide, capturing her transformation from a grassroots activist to an international public figure and documenting the challenges faced by activists resisting authoritarian regimes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mickey 17
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Ahmanet, una antigua y maldita princesa egipcia, despierta furiosa y siembra el terror entre los humanos. Solo un intrépido mercenario podrá detenerla y evitar que su ira destruya Londres.

NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Lost Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Teenage brothers Michael (Jason Patric) and Sam (Corey Haim) move with their mother (Dianne Wiest) to a small town in northern California. While the younger Sam meets a pair of kindred spirits in geeky comic-book nerds Edward (Corey Feldman) and Alan (Jamison Newlander), the angst-ridden Michael soon falls for Star (Jami Gertz) -- who turns out to be in thrall to David (Kiefer Sutherland), leader of a local gang of vampires. Sam and his new friends must save Michael and Star from the undead.

Peter must revisit a foggy past in which he abandoned Neverland for family life, leaving Tinkerbell (Julia Roberts) and the Lost Boys to fend for themselves. Given their bitterness toward Peter for growing up -- and their allegiance to their new leader, Rufio -- the old gang may not be happy to see him.

They follow the Yellow Brick Road toward the Emerald City to meet the Wizard, and en route they meet a Scarecrow that needs a brain, a Tin Man missing a heart, and a Cowardly Lion who wants courage. The wizard asks the group to bring him the broom of the Wicked Witch of the West to earn his help.

On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

AMC.HD.us2.description: This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both the astronauts' survival and their safe return to Earth.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos enemigos; Agua bendita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Señalan a Juan de participar en el secuestro y muerte de una parte de la familia de Abel. Debby subasta el agua de unos baños que se dio y su amigo Josué le exige la mitad del dinero ganado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Descuido involuntario; Ambrosia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hija de Karen, menor de edad, es fanática de los tatuajes, pero sufre serios daños al hacerse uno en el brazo. Melisa le inyecta a su abuelo su propia sangre porque él quiere rejuvenecer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El rey de los tahures
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un joven es testigo del asesinato de su padre y años más tarde se convierte en un tahúr obsesionado con encontrar al homicida. Finalmente, el destino pone a ambos hombres en el mismo camino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Preñada en coma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Victoria despertó del coma después de varios años, y para su sorpresa, ahora es madre; denuncia una violación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol estelar Liga MX: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo lo que pasa antes y después de los partidos de Liga MX, con lo mejor de Chivas, Tigres y Juárez. Análisis, datos y las voces de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Mexicano Primera División
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acción de la fecha 13 del Clausura 2026 de la Liga MX. Chivas busca retener el liderato y Pumas el tercer puesto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol estelar Liga MX: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo lo que pasa antes y después de los partidos de Liga MX, con lo mejor de Chivas, Tigres y Juárez. Análisis, datos y las voces de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La víctima
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rocío exige una compensación a Wilfredo por las violaciones, torturas y abusos que sufrió con él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Libertad; Vendiendo tareas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natalia quiere regresar a Colombia para realizarse profesionalmente y le propone a su marido que cuide de sus hijos durante ese tiempo. Una madre le causó un daño irremediable a su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de escuelita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los concursantes serán estudiantes coquetos y alumnas muy lindas, que estarán bajo la enseñanza del amor de su profesora, quien los ayuda a encontrar a su pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hombres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En este episodio se pone a prueba un viejo refrán que dice que los hombres son de Marte.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pijamada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mafia vs. policías
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las concursantes son parte de la mafia y serán perseguidas por policías, pero no para ser llevadas a prisión, sino para que surja el romance entre ellos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La sonrisa de un ángel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra encuentra una bolita en los ganglios de su hijo Santiago. Acude al médico y las noticias no son alentadoras, pero su hijo no deja de sonreír. Un linfoma cambia sus vidas y le demuestra que los milagros existen.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A mi hija le encanta la mala vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonia afirma que su hija no se respeta al permitir que su esposo la maltrate frente a sus hijos, pero ella insiste en que él la ama y no permitirá que su madre destruya su relación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Engaño inesperado; Peligroso soldado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para salvar su casa, Alberto la puso a nombre de su novia Stella, quien se la ha quitado. Rex es veterano de guerra y cree que su pequeña hija es fruto de una aventura de su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pegamento vaginal; Una mala inversión
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El esposo de Luisa la dejó tener sexo con otros hombres, pero se cansó y le cerró la vagina con pegamento. Un hombre invirtió en el negocio de un amigo y fue preso por narcotráfico, pero su mujer no lo ayudó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La ley de la fe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aldo viola a Marta, pero acusan a Pedro de atacarla y lo meten en la cárcel. Ella tiene un accidente y entra en coma. Meses después, Marta reacciona y la verdad sale a la luz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tatuajes del alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Fabián regresa a México después de ser deportado de los Estados Unidos. Se encuentra con su novia Ramona y descubre que ella tiene un prometido. El joven no se dará por vencido a perderla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Canción del alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rodrigo y su novia Adela se mudan a la capital para que él realice su sueño de ser un artista. La pareja deberá enfrentar nuevas tentaciones que la vida les pondrá en su camino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El coraje de Eli
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eli es ultrajada por dos miembros de su familia y al pedirle ayuda a sus padres, la visión machista se impone, la obligan a callar. Una amiga la hace reaccionar, el silencio no es una opción.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amalia en la montaña
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amalia sueña con seguir sus estudios, pero su padrastro tiene otros planes para ella que le garantizan un buen dinero, cuando acude a su madre no encuentra ningún apoyo, sino todo lo contrario.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La suerte está con Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula descubre que Diego ahora es un hombre libre y ella está dispuesta a reconquistar al hombre que la vuelve loca. Corona cita a Diego. Gavino empieza su negocio en la cárcel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Efectivo en bicicleta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las hermanas Ileana e Irasema compiten para ganar el dinero en efectivo. Los hermanos Osvaldo y Luis concursan para llevarse muchos premios de la jaula, tratan de multiplicarlos por dos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El reto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Denise, influencer famosa por sus peligrosos desafíos, recibe una advertencia tras la muerte de Paola, una seguidora. Pedir perdón no será suficiente en el difícil camino del arrepentimiento.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A mi hija le encanta la mala vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonia afirma que su hija no se respeta al permitir que su esposo la maltrate frente a sus hijos, pero ella insiste en que él la ama y no permitirá que su madre destruya su relación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mis hermanos invadieron mi casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcelo se queja de que sus hermanos invadieron la casa de su madre y pretenden que él los mantenga. Él decidió no darle más dinero a su mamá y ahora ella lo chantajea con que está muy enferma.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vieja porno; Conveniencia por secuestro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El sueño de Lola siempre fue ser actriz porno, contrató a una productora que lo que hizo fue un documental de inmigración. Además, al esposo de Ana lo tienen secuestrado en México.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una pequeña madre; Hija enfurecida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Katy es madre, pero su suegra la acusa de ser pandillera y quiere la custodia del niño. Sara y su esposo adoptaron a Mariana, pero su padre biológico salió de la cárcel y Sara desea que se vaya con él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Raptan a los hijos de Isabel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito no soporta que Diego trabaje con Circe y lo manda a buscar con sus hombres. Los matones se meten en casa de Isabel, mientras sus hijos están solos. Piochas negocia con Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño rico, niño pobre; Cadena man
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Yuri, la empleada doméstica, jugaba con el niño de la casa hasta que fue secuestrado por error. También, Lázaro es muy popular en las redes por las cadenas de oro, pero son falsas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Abuelo VR; La resurrección del misionero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El abuelo de Fabián y Panchito descubre unas gafas de realidad virtual que causan problemas en la familia. También, a Rolando le roban 5 000 dólares de la iglesia y ahora debe pagarlos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial hombres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Maduritos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bikinis
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secretarias y ejecutivos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Algunos de los romances prohibidos más apasionados suelen suceder a puerta cerrada en la oficina, y en este especial, los participantes hacen el papel de empresarios y secretarias para encontrar a la pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La novia tristre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristina llega feliz al día de su boda, pero el novio es asesinado antes de entrar a la iglesia. Ella se siente culpable por la muerte de Pablo y su suegra insiste en hacer su vida más difícil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mis hermanos invadieron mi casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcelo se queja de que sus hermanos invadieron la casa de su madre y pretenden que él los mantenga. Él decidió no darle más dinero a su mamá y ahora ella lo chantajea con que está muy enferma.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dulce para todos; Juego mortal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dulce fue adoptada por Carmen y tuvo una relación con el hermano de esta. Alexis es adicta a un juego que propone una familia virtual, pero descubre que su esposo también lo juega.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hija David; Estafa moribunda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Juan y Amelia tiene problemas con su identidad de género; el padre se viste de mujer. También, Luz ha descubierto que su hermana y su cuñado escondieron el cadáver de su madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tormento
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel no puede superar la pérdida de su nieto Rodrigo y vive atormentado por la culpa hasta que Diego llega a su vida. La necesidad de Daniel de volver a ser abuelo lo lleva a tomar la peor decisión.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una segunda oportunidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carla necesita un trasplante de corazón. Su esposo sufre y pide por un milagro para que ella pueda ver crecer a sus hijos y hará lo posible para conseguir un donante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Como caído del cielo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Flora se pone su vestido de novia y espera por Arturo, pero esa experiencia marca su vida. Una milagrosa confusión hace que Gustavo llegue a su vida para hacerla creer de nuevo en el amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mercancía de segunda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandra cree en Manuel y acepta vivir con él sin imaginar la humillación que le espera, luego se ilusiona con Giovanni, quien ya tiene planes para ella, un espiral del que será difícil escapar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hija no se vende
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Facundo y Cristina, dos humildes trabajadores, se esfuerzan por complacer a su única hija, quien desprecia su origen. Su gran capricho es una fiesta de 15 años, pero la vida le da una lección.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Raptan a los hijos de Isabel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito no soporta que Diego trabaje con Circe y lo manda a buscar con sus hombres. Los matones se meten en casa de Isabel, mientras sus hijos están solos. Piochas negocia con Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Otra vez la segunda y la tercera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marlene y Patricia quieren desafiar sus conocimientos y habilidades. Carolina y su mamá Mercedes juegan para multiplicar sus premios por dos. Yolanda y su hijo Christian vienen por un viaje.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Rostros
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Emilia, ambiciosa cirujana plástica, huye con su familia por trabajar con gente peligrosa. Paralizada por el miedo, no logra descubrir cuál es su pendiente, hasta que resulta tarde para todos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se cansó de luchar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cat Fish; Tráfico de sangre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Por venganza, Wendy creó perfiles falsos de Fernanda y puso sus datos en páginas eróticas. La sobrina de John tiene la hemoglobina baja y se desmaya en el colegio, él sospecha de su hermana.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Quiero sentir; Bajos instintos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pedro perdió sensibilidad en su pene cuando le hicieron la circuncisión y quiere que su hermano gemelo le done su miembro. Patricia salió embarazada de Marco, pero no ha elegido al mejor padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ya lo agarraron de su puerquito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Visita del pasado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Piochas y don Mateo preparan la emboscada para liquidar a Joselito. Así, cobrarán la recompensa por su cabeza. Isabel no quiere volver a ver a Diego. Circe hace brujería para atraer a su amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: DJ Hugo; 25% de vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liz contrató los servicios de un imitador y un DJ para el lanzamiento de una bebida, pero se emborracharon. Perla va a perder su casa y su hermana no puede ayudarla por estar entre pandillas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dominican Power; Violada o enamorada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Vale Juan es muy popular en las redes, por eso su esposa piensa que le es infiel. También, Charlotte fue violada cuando era adolescente, pero continuó la relación con el hombre que la violó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Naúfragos y marineras
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Charleston
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los participantes encarnan sus versiones de la década del 20 y bailan al ritmo de esta variedad de foxtrot.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Moda fosforescente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un capítulo lleno de brillo, no sólo por los participantes, sino por la moda fosforescente. Todos intentan llamar la atención del sexo opuesto para encontrar a la pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial banda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vivir por ella
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de pasar 20 años en la cárcel por un crimen que no cometió, Perla sale libre y lo único que desea es recuperar a su hija, que está en manos de la mujer que la condenó por celos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se cansó de luchar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Estúpida ley; Justicia propia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Desde que Patricia tiene una relación de noviazgo con otro trabajador, Miriam le ha dado un ultimátum. Bryan se comió el plato de exposición de un restaurante y la dueña tomó acciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Famosos falsos; Pasión desencadenada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura se dedica a hacer sentir famosa a gente corriente, pero Kike no quiere pagar sus servicios. La esposa de David está muy enferma y no tienen relaciones íntimas; él tuvo un desliz con Sofía.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La señora de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras estar 20 años en la cárcel por un crimen que no cometió, Perla sale libre. Ahora, lo único que desea es recuperar a su hija, quien está en manos de la mujer que la condenó por celos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una luz en el abismo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El mundo de una madre se derrumba cuando su marido muere y ella se queda sola con sus dos hijos pequeños. Isabel vuelve a encontrar el amor en Marcelo, pero él no es el príncipe que ella pensaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El secreto de mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ricardo se entera de que su madre, Esmeralda, no es enfermera. Después de un golpe muy duro, él tiene que escoger entre su novia y la mujer que lo trajo el mundo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mía o de nadie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Gisela, casi por lástima, acepta salir con Andrés en calidad de amigos, su vida se convierte en una horrible pesadilla que poco a poco la aleja de todas aquellas personas a las que ama.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mintiéndome a mí misma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La frustración por su difícil situación económica empuja a Jaime a sellar una alianza con Armando, y juntos, comienzan a robar. Una mala decisión complica las cosas, solo tendrá una salida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Visita del pasado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Piochas y don Mateo preparan la emboscada para liquidar a Joselito. Así, cobrarán la recompensa por su cabeza. Isabel no quiere volver a ver a Diego. Circe hace brujería para atraer a su amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las comadres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paulina y Pamela, hermanas, vienen por el dinero en efectivo para celebrar el bautizo de su bebé. Yukari y Said desean el set de muebles para equipar un rincón de reuniones sociales en su casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vida lejana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Verona, influencer, está por firmar un gran contrato, pero una alerta la hace confesar un secreto que la avergüenza y que la lleva a suplicar perdón hasta el último segundo de su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ya lo agarraron de su puerquito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi esposo enfermó a mi hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Teresa denuncia que su esposo Andrés maltrata a su hija Azul y le ha causado daños emocionales que requieren tratamiento médico. Él niega ser su padre y rechaza asumir esos gastos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Maestra desbocada; Muerte Facebook Live
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Zulema emitió su opinión contra el presidente Trump, Itzel la subió a las redes y la despidieron. También, la amante de Andrés se suicidó por Facebook Live: allí los culpó a él y a su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La gallinita ciega; Morticia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para levantar la moral de sus trabajadores, Luis contrata un crucero y organiza una orgía. También, Morticia tiene una empresa funeraria que se dedica a levantar y reconstruir cadáveres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se quiere dar a mi novia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hombre muerto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El estado de salud de Corona empeora y las esperanzas son cada vez menores. Isabel está dispuesta a hacer lo que sea para salvar al padre de sus hijos. Gavino y Joselito se declaran la guerra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Meditación tortuosa; El riñón es mío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El niño de Miriam tiene ataques de pánico desde que lo dejaron solo y a oscuras en una terapia. Mildrey viajó para hacerse una cirugía estética; de regreso descubre que le falta un riñón.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Mallorca-Real Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Udinese-Como
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La Serie A lleva temporadas en las que ha añadido un tono más ofensivo a la competitividad que tiene asociada como santo y seña. El campeonato italiano cumple su 94ª temporada y lo hace con un grupo de equipos que aspira a todo. El Nápoles defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Zaragoza - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Romareda pide oficio: el Zaragoza buscará un partido sobrio, control emocional y protección del área propia. Con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, los maños necesitan eficiencia; el Mirandés intentará hacer daño en transiciones y segundas jugadas.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Eibar - Ceuta
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Eibar querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Ceuta intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Almería - Leganés

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Racing
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Andorra querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Racing intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Huesca
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Las Palmas querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Huesca intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Zaragoza - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Romareda pide oficio: el Zaragoza buscará un partido sobrio, control emocional y protección del área propia. Con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, los maños necesitan eficiencia; el Mirandés intentará hacer daño en transiciones y segundas jugadas.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Sporting - Real Sociedad B
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Sporting - Real Sociedad B
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Sporting querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: R. Sociedad B intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Post Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Sporting - Real Sociedad B
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Los entrenadores de los equipos de LaLiga HyperMotion desmenuzan las claves que, según ellos, han propiciado el resultado del partido que acaban de jugar.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Castellón querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Granada intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Scottish Premiership
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: FC Dundee – Celtic Glasgow (32. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Scottish Premiership ist seit 2013 die höchste Fußballliga in Schottland und gehört zur Scottish Professional Football League. 2013 wurde sie als Nachfolger für die Scottish Premier League gegründet.  (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Campeonato Brasileiro
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Atletico Mineiro – Athletico Paranaense (10. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: FC Volendam – Feyenoord Rotterdam (29. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Pogon Stettin – Legia Warschau (27. Spieltag)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Liga Profesional Apertura (13. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Fußball aus der ganzen Welt mit allen Höhepunkten aus den internationalen Top-Ligen. In dieser Ausgebe von "scooore" werden die spektakulärsten und wichtigsten Szenen aus der höchsten Argentinischen Fußball-Liga gezeigt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Copa Sudamericana
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Deportivo Cuenca (ECU) – Santos (BRA) (Gruppenphase, 1. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Im zweitwichtigsten Wettbewerg des südamerikanischen Vereinsfußballs waren bisher die Vereine aus Argentinien am erfolgreichsten. Titelverteidiger ist in diesem Jahr CSD Defensa Justicia aus Florencia Varela in Argentinien. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: PSV Eindhoven – FC Utrecht (29. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Ekstraklasa
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Pogon Stettin – Legia Warschau (27. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: 16 Vereine kämpfen um den polnischen Meistertitel. Nach der Hin- und Rückserie kommen die besten acht Teams in die Meisterschaftsrunde, in der nur noch ein Mal jeder gegen jeden gespielt wird. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Im Rampenlicht – Footballs Greatest Stage
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Luka Modric
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Große Turniere wie Welt- und Europameisterschaften, aber auch die Champions League oder der UEFA-Cup sind ideale Bühnen, auf denen sich Fußballspieler einen Namen machen, und ihren Marktwert steigern können. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Scooore! – Internationales Fußball-Magazin
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Tore und Ergebnisse international
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Gezeigt werden Szenen aus der Eredivisie (Niederlande), Liga NOS (Portugal), Hyundai A-League (Australien), J. League (Japan) sowie die Copa Libertadores, Copa Sudamericana und Copa do Brasil. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Portugal! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Primeira Liga (28. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Sendung informiert über die Highlights und alle Tore in den aktuellen Spielen im portugiesischen Fußball. Die Erste Liga bietet unterhaltsame Spiele auf allerhöchstem Niveau. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Scottish Premiership
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: FC Dundee – Celtic Glasgow (32. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Scottish Premiership ist seit 2013 die höchste Fußballliga in Schottland und gehört zur Scottish Professional Football League. 2013 wurde sie als Nachfolger für die Scottish Premier League gegründet.  (Senderinfo).

Inducted into the Fight Wing of the UFC Hall of Fame last summer, Adesanya is the only man to hold the UFC middleweight title twice, amassing victories over the likes of Robert Whittaker, Paulo Costa, Jared Cannonier and Alex Pereira during the course of his illustrious career.
